daily.today_energy: Your vibe is electric today, Gemini. The cosmos is rewarding your curiosity with unexpected connections and sparks of inspiration. Lean into conversations that feel organic—your words have extra magic right now.
daily.love: Whether single or coupled up, your authenticity is absolutely magnetic today. Skip the games and just be real with someone. The universe is vibing with genuine energy, and people can feel it radiating off you.
daily.career: Your ideas are hitting different today. If you've been sitting on a thought or project, this is your moment to share it. Trust your instincts—your creative momentum is building toward something worthwhile.
daily.health: Your body's asking for movement and fresh air. A walk, stretching, or literally anything that gets you outside will shift your energy beautifully. Listen to what feels good rather than what you think you should do.

weekly.overview: Mercury's dancing through your sector of self-expression this week, Gemini. You're feeling chatty, creative, and genuinely magnetic. People are drawn to your energy rn. Trust the momentum and lean into conversations that matter.
weekly.love: Venus is whispering soft energy your way. Whether you're coupled up or exploring connections, authenticity is your superpower right now. Someone's noticing the real you, and that's exactly what makes things interesting.
weekly.career: Your ideas are hitting different this week. That project or concept you've been mulling over? It's got legs. Your communication skills are next level, so speak up in meetings and share what's on your mind. Visibility is calling.
weekly.health: Your nervous system might feel a lil activated—channel that into movement you actually enjoy. A walk, dancing, stretching, whatever feels good. Hydrate more than usual and give yourself permission to rest without guilt.
